case_title: JOHN HARRINGTON ET AL VS. KEVIN WILEY, CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,480.00 FILED BY HARRINGTON, JOHN LOKEY, LORRY I. AS TO DEFENDANT KEVIN WILEY, CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT THE SUMMIT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-16-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SUMMIT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRINGTON, JOHN LOKEY, LORRY I. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KEVIN WILEY, CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT $3,480.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,560.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST THE SUMMIT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRINGTON, JOHN LOKEY, LORRY I. AS TO DEFENDANT KEVIN WILEY, CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRINGTON, JOHN LOKEY, LORRY I. AS TO DEFENDANT KEVIN WILEY, CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT KEVIN WILEY, CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOKEY, LORRY I.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT KEVIN WILEY, CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRINGTON, JOHN LOKEY, LORRY I. AS TO DEFENDANT THE SUMMIT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-28-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KEVIN WILEY, CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF, JOHN HARRINGTON WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF LORRY LOKEY WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH JOHN HARRINGTON (TITLE: STEPFATHER). THE DEFENDANTS WERE PRESENT. THE DEFENDANTSUMMIT HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH PAUL MORA (TITLE: PROPERTY MGR). THE DEFENDANT CITISCAPE WAS REPRESENTED THROUGH NICHOLAS BERG (TITLE: PRINCIPAL OF THE COMPANY). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT KEVIN WILEY, CITISCAPE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
